title: dasyphyllum horridum
intro: Dasyphyllum horridum, also known as the "thorny daisy", is a type of flowering plant native to South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Dasyphyllum horridum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
